titleStmt.title: SII 9.376: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 376. (A.R. No. 717 of 1919.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLARAYYA TEMPLE AT NERANIKI, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1198, the 5th year of the reign of the Yādava king Rāmachandradēva, cyclic year Dhātu, Chaitra, śu. 1, Maṅgaḷavāra corresponding to A.D. 1276 March 17 Tuesday; f.d.t. 18. It records that Lahkumidēva-Nāyaka, agent of Vasudēva, made a grant of 4 mattars of land for the service of the god Kalināthadēva. It also specifies the various articles of offerings to be made to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakavaruṣa 1198 neya sva
sti śrīmatu yādavanārayaṇa
prauḍhapratapacakravarti śrīramacaṁ
dradēvana vijayarājyada Aideneya dhāta
saṁvaścarada caitra su 1 maṁ vadalu vasudēvana
sarvvādhikāri lakhumidēvanāyakaru ka
lināthadēvarige pātrake Uparake koṭṭa keI
nāku mataru mu(ṁ)nna Ikuva sotra bhaṭasarvva
mānyāgi bha dēvara paḍi hotare Obaḷa Aki mose
rōgara hagalu vobaḷa kaṇikada maṁ
ḍage Aravāna tuppa bhaige Obaḷa Akiya paya
sa Aravana tuppa pātra Ida naḍasuvaru ja
kēri Odagāṇa sidayagaṇa vala Eṇe ga
de koḷaga hattaṟa bede vāsadēvana lakhumidē
vana nābhayadarmma nagara sakalapprajoṁ
mige paḷisalī dharmma . svadataṁ paradataṁ
va yō harēti vasuṁdhari ṣaṣṭirvvaru
ṣasahasraṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
maṁgaḷa māhāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.376 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
